concerns.description: The fix blanket-excludes all 4xx errors including HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests), which is a transient rate-limit signal that the SDK is designed to retry. Skipping retries on 429 eliminates the one category of 4xx that can recover, making the fix actively harmful for rate-limited calls.

401 Unauthorized errors are also 4xx and will be silently swallowed after the first attempt with no operator alert, despite representing a credential failure that requires human intervention. The fix does not distinguish 401 from other 4xx codes, leaving operators without a signal that authentication has broken.
